name: JED Character Card Generator
description:
A character generator assistant. Answer 'yes' to the first message and follow the instructions in its responses to obtain an efficient card for roleplaying. Remember to use a high number of maximum tokens generated (or set maximum token to 0 for unrestricted).

READ DESCRIPTION AND UTILIZATION TIPS

This card generator is based on the JED (Just Enough Definitions) template, a merge of different card templates used to offer a user-friendly template for those seeking a streamlined method for crafting characters.

LLMs are machines, and they interpret text differently. Prose is functional for character cards and easy to read as a user, but not only it consumes more tokens but the AI might pick up on the writing style used to write the definitions, negatively affecting the roleplay.

JED aims to be a compromise between code-like styles and prose. It follows a precise structure that minimizes prose used while still being easily readable by a human. It can be quite technical in its construction and usage, so REFER to the utilization tips for best results. For learning more about JED, go to the following link: https://rentry.co/CharacterProvider-GuideToBotmaking

UTILIZATION TIPS

1- I STRONGLY SUGGEST to use an empty persona for chatting, or your persona's definition might leak into the bot's answers. I also SUGGEST to use the following system prompt: https://pastebin.com/ZsXM4qDJ

2- Due to the way the messages are processed and shown to the user by most chatting interfaces, the results of STEP-1 might look extremely weird at first. DO NOT simply copy the bot's answers as they are. ENTER INTO EDIT MODE of the message to make sure that you're copying the full markdown structure of the generated definition.

J.AI is one of the worst offenders of this, since it also does this to the definitions of public bots. For example, If you check the personality box of this bot, you will see a lot of weird graphical elements that are not representative of it. FULL PERSONALITY CODE OF THIS BOT CAN BE SEEN HERE: https://pastebin.com/UKhELBak

For similar reasons, the generated messages, even in edit mode, might be lacking space between paragraphs. Be sure that there are at least 2 newlines between each paragraph. Es:

[ # Character

## Overview 

] 

3- Don't hesitate to ask the bot to remake or expand upon part of its responses. By asking to expand a specific section, you'll get a much more detailed answer for t
creator: Hobold
